releaseNotes: CRITICAL FIX: Preload script was broken — all Electron features (LLM install, auto-update, notifications) now work. GPU compatibility for animations on laptops.

notes: CRITICAL FIX: Preload script was broken by ESM/CJS mismatch — window.electronAPI was never defined
Fix: Renamed preload.js to preload.cjs so Electron loads it as CommonJS correctly
Fix: LLM Install button now appears in Profile — was showing browser fallback toggle instead
Fix: Shadow Chat now works — native LLM bridge connects properly via IPC
Fix: Auto-update, notifications, store sync — all Electron features now functional
Fix: First-launch LLM download prompt now appears for new users
Fix: Animations not rendering on some laptops — added GPU compatibility switches (ignore-gpu-blocklist, enable-gpu-rasterization)
Added asarUnpack config for node-llama-cpp native binaries
Added onNativeLLMStatusChange listener in Profile — UI updates when model finishes loading
Update now preserves ALL user data — no more reset after updating
Crash-safe state loading — old data with missing fields is merged with defaults instead of crashing
Store items now cheap (2-5 NC) so everything is affordable
All store items available from level 1
Version migration only removes truly obsolete keys, never user progress
Fixed Local LLM — prominent Install AI Model button in Profile
Fixed Store — all items now have real prices, starting credits raised to 100
Fixed update crash — version migration system auto-cleans stale localStorage
Lowered level requirements on store items
Removed 'Model (optional)' field from Electron LLM panel
Store preview modal — full overview, training plan, quests, and deliverables before purchase
PDF training guide download after buying any protocol or book
Rich content for all 11 protocols and 8 books
Sound effects system
Achievement burst animation
Stat radar chart, habit donut, EXP/NC ratio in Mission Debrief
Data export/import (JSON backup and restore)
Keyboard shortcuts
App icon for Windows taskbar
Penalty Zone removed
Changelog panel connected to GitHub Gist
Shadow Chat professional UI redesign with LLM status indicator and persona dropdown
First-time tutorial — 8-step onboarding guide for new users
Mission Debrief: monthly and yearly reports with bar charts
Store system overhaul — level-gated items
EXP formula changed to n³ × 20, rank thresholds compressed
Ranks removed from display — only Level shown
Achievement unlock burst animation
Data export/import (JSON backup)
Keyboard shortcuts for tab navigation
Shadow Chat persona selector — 6 voices
First-launch LLM download prompt with progress bar
CPU-only inference via node-llama-cpp
Shadow Chat memory persists to localStorage
Website overhaul: 3D hologram, scroll animations, hex graph, AI agents section
Model: Qwen2.5-2B-Instruct (Q4_K_M, ~1.5 GB) from HuggingFace
Effort-mirror tone: Sync to Log.
3-of-7 streak window with rest tokens.
SAGE, TITAN, CHRONOS, MANAGER domain-stat badges.
Mission Debrief tab.
Changelog panel.
Manual update button in main menu.
Logout clears all data.
Splash boot animation.
3-section HabitLab.
Multi-agent orchestrator wiring.
Initial public release of NEXUS Self-Evolution.
6 stats, 24 components, multi-agent AI orchestration.
